ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configuration_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration option */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the configuration option */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration option (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "requires" TEXT /* Version and API level requirements for the configuration option */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the configuration option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration option */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration option is required */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration option */,
  "last_modified_on" TEXT /* Date the configuration option was last modified */,
  "min_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the minimum application version required for the configuration option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_options_min_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("min_version_id") REFERENCES application_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_options_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the function group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the function group */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the function group was created */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the function group is protected */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the function group */,
  "last_modified_on" TEXT /* Date the function group was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the function group */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application version the function group is linked to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_groups_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES application_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_groups_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, tester) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function group affected by the change */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option applied */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, delete, protect, unprotect) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES function_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES configuration_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "min_api_level" INTEGER /* Minimum API level required for the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is still supported */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* Download link for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_info" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "api_level" INTEGER /* API level of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the application was installed on the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the application */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Date the device information was last updated */,
  "last_used_on" TEXT /* Date the application was last used on the device */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device is active */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_info_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
